name: Findoo
description: Bridge to LangGraph strategy-agent via A2A protocol — financial analysis, strategy design, risk assessment, portfolio management.

apiKey.description: Findoo license key (required). Also accepted via FINDOO_API_KEY env var.

strategyAgentUrl.description: Strategy Agent service URL (LangGraph A2A). Default: http://43.128.100.43:5085

strategyAssistantId.description: LangGraph assistant UUID to route A2A calls to.

apiKey.label: License Key
apiKey.help: Findoo 分析服务授权密钥

strategyAgentUrl.label: Strategy Agent URL
strategyAgentUrl.help: LangGraph A2A 策略分析服务地址
